watchlist.title: Personal Watchlist
watchlist.subtitle: stocks tracked · Updates every 30 seconds
watchlist.addDesc: Add a BVB stock and set optional price alerts
watchlist.emptyDesc: Add stocks to track them and receive alerts when the price reaches your target values.
watchlist.step1Desc: Search for the symbol (e.g., TLV, SNP) and add to list
watchlist.step2Desc: Get notified when the price goes above/below a value
watchlist.step4Desc: Note the price you bought at or other details

fiscal.title: BVB Tax Calculator
fiscal.subtitle: Did you know on BVB you only pay 3-6% tax on gains? Calculate exactly how much you owe.
fiscal.hasSalary: I have a salary (CASS paid there)
fiscal.cassWarning: Without salary, you'll owe CASS (10%) if income > 24,300 RON/year
fiscal.fiscalQuestionsDesc: Our AI tax advisor answers questions about taxes, declarations, CASS, W-8BEN and more.
fiscal.hasSRLOrPFA: Have an SRL, PFA or multiple entities?
fiscal.simulatorDesc: Tax simulator with dividend calculation, CASS, micro aggregation
fiscal.disclaimerText: Calculations are indicative and based on current legislation. Tax law may change. For your specific situation, consult a certified accountant (CECCAR). FinRomania does not provide tax or legal advice.
fiscal.investOnBVBDesc: Good news! Romania has one of the most advantageous tax regimes for stock market investors: only 3-6% tax on gains!

import.title: Import Portfolio
import.subtitle: Upload or paste your broker CSV report. AI automatically parses any format.
import.brokerHints: How to export from your broker:
import.errorUpload: Paste or upload a transaction report

simulator.title: Entrepreneur Tax Simulator
simulator.subtitle: Understand how taxation works for multiple entities
simulator.rules2026Desc: This simulator uses 2026 tax rules (OUG 89/2025, OUG 8/2026). For real tax decisions, consult a certified accountant!
simulator.addEntitiesDesc: Add all legal forms you own (SRL, PFA, PFI, etc.)
simulator.profitMarginHint: Profit / Revenue × 100. E.g.: IT/Consulting ~40-50%, Retail ~5-10%, Services ~20-30%
simulator.otherAssociations: Are you a partner/administrator in OTHER companies with over 25% ownership?
simulator.hasSalaryWithCASS: Have a salary with CASS paid?
simulator.allOnOneRegime: If all income were under one regime
